title: Webkitium Design Tokens
description: W3C Design Tokens Community Group format (draft 2024) with webkitium extensions for platform overrides, protection scopes, and extension-API addressability.

$version.description: Semver. Bumped on schema changes; extension API negotiates min version.

dev.webkitium.protection.description: Default protection for all tokens in this file unless overridden on a leaf.

dev.webkitium.platform.description: If present, tokens in this file are only emitted for the listed platforms.

dev.webkitium.protection.description: themeable = user + extension can write via browser.theme API; platform-only = generator emits but API cannot read/write; secure-fixed = compile-time constant, signed into the binary

dev.webkitium.syncable.description: If true, value is part of the sync payload. Defaults to true for themeable tokens, false otherwise.

dev.webkitium.api-path.description: Override the auto-derived API path. Normally the dotted path of the token is used.
